policy.stage_1: Keep source tests that call exact 3A-aligned source functions in the public L1 scope.
policy.stage_2: For mixed public/internal tests, every explicit aligned internal call must map through 3A to public target API functions. The adapter must call those substitutions explicitly. Otherwise the case is excluded before adapter synthesis.
policy.post_screen_conversion: Eligible cases are adapter conversion obligations. A conversion that cannot produce a valid Rust replay must remain recorded as excluded during conversion or missing after finite attempts.
